'''âl-g-m-f''' ('''kalagmefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vorpalize|vorpalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vorpalize|vorpalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-g-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| kalagmefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilagmefoko|thilagmefoko]] || [[word:jilagmefoko|jilagmefoko]] || [[word:shilagmefoko|shilagmefoko]] || [[word:kilagmefoko|kilagmefoko]]
|-
